response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum experience requirements with 19 years of engineering work and director-level seniority, backed by strong technical breadth and MIT credentials. However, he lacks the specialized AI expertise that is central to this role—his AI involvement appears to have started only recently (April 2025) with no demonstrated products or platforms built with AI, and he lacks the preferred master's degree or PhD in AI. While his entrepreneurial experience and system design capabilities are valuable, the gap between a generalist full-stack engineer and a recognized AI strategist is substantial.
strengths: 19 years of progressive engineering experience with multiple staff-level roles demonstrating director-level individual contributor capabilities
Proven founder and builder with GISCollective platform currently in production use, showing ability to conceptualize and execute complex systems
Exceptional technical breadth across web, mobile, infrastructure, and systems engineering with strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: Minimal demonstrated AI/ML expertise with recent involvement (April 2025) limited to MCP code generators and AI-agent infrastructure rather than AI product strategy or platforms
No master's degree or PhD in AI-related field, and no evidence of building recognized AI products or platforms as required by job description
Career focused on generalist full-stack engineering rather than specialized AI strategy, cloud platform strategy, or advisory roles with strategic customers
